name: qwksearch-desktop
description: QwkSearch Desktop - Select text, press ` to search web
author: QwkSearch <support@qwksearch.com>

scripts.docker:windows: mkdir -p dist && sudo docker build -t qwksearch-windows -f Dockerfile.windows . && sudo docker run -v "$(pwd)/dist:/output" qwksearch-windows
scripts.docker:build:linux: mkdir -p dist && sudo docker build -t qwksearch-linux -f Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:all: npm run docker:linux && npm run docker:windows
scripts.tauri:macos: cross-env LINUXDEPLOY_SKIP_STRIP=1 NO_STRIP=true tauri build --bundles dmg,app
